mvw.mvw_command: cargo build -p serde --features derive --tests --jobs 1 && cargo test -p serde --features derive --jobs 1 -- --test-threads=1
mvw.input_scale: serde crate with derive feature, single-job build and single-thread test

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread/multi-process peak included.

static_triage.notes: Rust serialization framework; no GPU requirement; build/test are CPU and memory sensitive.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build moderate-high (cargo compiling crates), run moderate (unit and integration tests)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 0.2634 GB, run 0.1222 GB, disk 0.1247 GB.
